summary: Sprint A testing complete — Asset Photo+GPS and New Inspection UI. Backend: 16/16 pytest pass (test_sprint_a_photo_gps_inspection.py) covering asset create with base64 photo + GPS, GET/PUT preserves photo when null, paginated list, inspection submit (OK + not_ok). Frontend: All Inspection UI flows verified — dual-pane layout, DHANBAD shows '0 of 73 assets queued', left location nav (31 bulk-select buttons), 73 asset checkboxes with data-testid, inline form expansion, OK/Not OK/Needs Repair radio buttons, Defective Since section (both not_ok and needs_repair), Rectified On section (OK on defective asset), Select all bulk select, progress banner updates, sticky submit bar with breakdown, successful inspection submit + form reset. Asset Registry: Add Asset dialog shows IDENTIFICATION PHOTO & GPS section with camera upload area + Lat/Lng inputs, GPS form link to Google Maps appears when coords entered, validation toast fires correctly. MapPin confirmed via API test (existing assets don't have GPS; icon will appear when GPS is stored).

issues: Pre-existing: 'Defective since 2026-05-07T06:00:599000' — bad timestamp format in existing seed data (milliseconds=599000 is invalid). Per problem statement this is a known pre-existing data issue, not a Sprint A bug.

critical_code_review_comments: assets.py update_asset (line 367): 'if asset.identification_photo is not None' correctly preserves photo — tested and verified.

assets.py list_assets: identification_photo, geo_lat, geo_lng are NOT added to serialized output for OLD assets that lack these fields in MongoDB. This is expected and correct — serialize_doc only outputs what's in the document. New assets created with these fields will include them.
serialize_doc in database.py preserves _id as string key (not renamed to id). This is consistent with how the frontend uses asset._id everywhere. No bug.
InspectionPage.js: makeItem() initializes checklist_responses from asset.checklist — correct pattern. bulkToggleLocation correctly deduplicates by checking existing Set.
AssetsPage.js uses resizeAndEncode() to cap images at 1024px before storing as base64 — good for DB size control. exifr.gps() extraction is wrapped in try/catch — defensive and correct.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all Sprint A testids present, all role-based flows verified, inspection submit confirmed

seed_data_creation: None. Backend tests create and clean up TEST_ prefixed assets during run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint A complete. Backend: POST /api/assets now stores identification_photo (base64 data URL), geo_lat, geo_lng in MongoDB. PUT /api/assets/{id} only updates photo if non-null. GET /api/assets and GET /api/assets/{id} return these fields for assets that have them. Inspection page fully replaced with dual-pane layout. Key testids: inspection-page, station-select, inspection-progress, location-nav, asset-checkbox-{id}, asset-form-{id}, status-ok-{id}, status-not_ok-{id}, status-needs_repair-{id}, bulk-select-loc-{loc_id}, nav-loc-{loc_id}, inspection-submit-button, defective-time-{id}, rectified-date-{id}. Assets page: asset-create-button, asset-photo-upload, asset-photo-preview, asset-geo-lat, asset-geo-lng. DHANBAD has 73 assets. exifr library installed (v7.1.3) for EXIF GPS extraction. Previous Health Explorer (iter 26) unaffected.
rca_of_issues: No bugs found. All Sprint A features implemented and tested successfully.
